description: Create the compiler2-native interface data model. Add module-owned interface state under `ModuleMap`, add `FactKey::ModuleInterface(ModuleId)`, replace string-shaped compiler2 exports with `FunctionId`-backed callable entries plus callable kind/variadic metadata, and provide intentful `ModuleInterface` query methods (`public_function_with_name_arity`, `macro_with_name_arity`, `exported_functions`, `exported_macros`). Keep exact lookup and set selection distinct: exact lookup records obligations lazily; set selection returns `Ready|Pending` and takes an optional `except` filter. Signal: compiler2 has one authoritative interface payload shape and callers can express intent without open-coding export filtering.
title: Compiler2 interface model: add module-owned callable interface state and ModuleInterface fact
